title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入菲律宾：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入菲律賓：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Philippines BPS / PNS standards practice, ERC grid and ancillary-services review, fire-safety, UN 38.3 transport, and 60 Hz design expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与菲律宾BPS/PNS标准实践、ERC并网和辅助服务审查、消防安全、UN 38.3运输及60Hz设计要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與菲律賓BPS/PNS標準實務、ERC併網和輔助服務審查、消防安全、UN 38.3運輸及60Hz設計要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BPS / PNS adoption determination, ERC approval, grid-connection approval, ancillary-services qualification, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and project owners should verify current Philippines BPS, ERC, DOE, grid, fire, transport, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, contracting, energisation, or commissioning.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BPS/PNS采标认定、ERC批准、并网批准、辅助服务资格、消防安全批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和项目业主在出货、签约、送电或调试前，应与合格专业人士核验现行菲律宾BPS、ERC、DOE、电网、消防、运输及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BPS/PNS採標認定、ERC批准、併網批准、輔助服務資格、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和項目業主在出貨、簽約、送電或調試前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行菲律賓BPS、ERC、DOE、電網、消防、運輸及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to the Philippines, do not assume a whole-unit lithium BESS BPS mandatory certification route unless a specific BPS technical regulation, importer route, or project document calls it up. The main gaps are confirmation of any PNS adoption or acceptance of IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 evidence, UN 38.3 transport documentation, ERC / grid approval for storage and ancillary services, Fire Code review, 60 Hz electrical design, and clause mapping from China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口菲律宾时，除非具体BPS技术法规、进口商路径或项目文件明确要求，不应假定整套锂电BESS存在BPS强制认证路径。主要差距包括确认PNS是否采纳或接受IEC 62619 / IEC 62933证据、UN 38.3运输文件、储能及辅助服务相关ERC/电网审批、消防规范审查、60Hz电气设计，以及与中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023的条款映射。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口菲律賓時，除非具體BPS技術法規、進口商路徑或項目文件明確要求，不應假定整套鋰電BESS存在BPS強制認證路徑。主要差距包括確認PNS是否採納或接受IEC 62619 / IEC 62933證據、UN 38.3運輸文件、儲能及輔助服務相關ERC/電網審批、消防規範審查、60Hz電氣設計，以及與中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023的條款映射。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
